title: Puthu Vasantham
desc: While the parents search for a suitable prospect for their daughter Selvi's marriage, she expresses her desire to get married to a joint family.

title: Lakshmi
desc: Maha, her family's primary breadwinner, wants to keep supporting her family even after marrying Selvam. However, things become complicated as obstacles test their family bonds and marriage.

title: Irumalargal
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Aadukalam
desc: Talented dancers compete against each other by showcasing their dancing skills to win the coveted title and emerge victorious.

title: Pazhani
desc: A man is released from prison and becomes his sister's driver, without her knowledge. However, when the truth is revealed, the siblings strive to reconcile.

title: News
desc: The host provides the latest information, advancements, and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Chellame Chellame
desc: Twins Kavin and Nila, separated at birth, unwittingly reunite at school, triggering events that compel their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their devastating past.

title: Annam
desc: Annam, a bright and cheerful young woman, faces the challenges of life while withstanding the harsh treatment from her stepmother.

title: Kayal
desc: Kayal, a selfless woman, earns to provide for her family after her father abandons them. Despite being overwhelmed with responsibilities, she puts her loved ones' well-being before her own happiness.

title: Marumagal
desc: Prabhu is a miser and puts his needs ahead of his family. Circumstances bring him closer to Aadhirai, who helps others selflessly.

title: Moondru Mudichu
desc: Nandini, a vivacious girl, gets married to Suryakumar, a businessman. However, the couple strives to navigate their relationship along with balancing familial responsibilities.

title: Singapenne
desc: Anandi, a village belle, embarks on a solo journey to fulfil her duties as a daughter and shoulder the responsibilities of her family.

title: Ethirneechal Thodargiradhu
desc: Janani and the women of the household embark on a journey to pursue their ambitions in the wake of Aadhimuthu Gunasekaran's downfall, while navigating the challenges of society.

title: Malli
desc: A bodacious village girl's life transforms when she bonds with a loving father and his daughter, uncovering the true meaning of love, family and belonging.

title: Sugamana Ragangal
desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular melodious songs composed and performed by various renowned artists played back to back.

desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular devotional songs in praise of deities performed by eminent artists is played back-to-back.

title: Aalaya Vazhipadu
desc: A religious scholar sheds light on the history behind various temples, as well as the significance and meaning of diverse rituals and customs.

desc: A religious leader sheds light on various teachings and principles from the Hindu scriptures and encourages followers to reflect on the same.

desc: A renowned astrologer provides a comprehensive insight into the position of stars and makes astrological predictions for the 12 zodiac signs.
